title: How to Get a Police Certificate - Vanuatu - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate - Vanuatu
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Police Clearance Certificate

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.
You should apply in person or online at the Commissioner of Police (see Contact Information for complete address).

## Special considerations
Vanuatu Police Clearance certificate will be issued for non-citizens residing in Vanuatu and also non-citizens who entered Vanuatu as a short or long stay visitor.
A Vanuatu Police Clearance certificate will not be issued to a Vanuatu Citizen who has obtained Vanuatu citizenship through the Vanuatu Development Program, but never entered or resided in Vanuatu.
Vanuatu Police Force P.M.B 9014 Vansec House Port Vila VANUATU Phone from within Vanuatu: 22222 Phone from outside Vanuatu: +678 22222
